name: Image
description: Image processing: thumbnail, resize, crop, format conversion, EXIF stripping

skills.name: Thumbnail
skills.description: Generate a thumbnail of an image (fast, lower quality than resize)

skills.name: Resize
skills.description: Resize an image to exact dimensions using Lanczos3 interpolation

skills.name: Crop
skills.description: Crop a rectangular region from an image

skills.name: Format Convert
skills.description: Convert image between formats (png, jpeg, webp)

skills.name: EXIF Strip
skills.description: Strip EXIF metadata from an image by re-encoding pixel data
